# terrible_cisco_dnac_task_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `data` (String) Data query parameter. Fetch tasks that contains this data.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `endTime` (String) EndTime query parameter. This is the epoch end time upto which audit records need to be fetched.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `errorCode` (String) ErrorCode query parameter. Fetch tasks that have this error code.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `failureReason` (String) FailureReason query parameter. Fetch tasks that contains this failure reason.
- `headers` (String) Additional headers.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `isError` (String) IsError query parameter. Fetch tasks ended as success or failure. Valid values true, false.
- `limit` (Number) Limit query parameter. The number of records to show for this page;The minimum is 1, and the maximum is 500.
- `offset` (Number) Offset query parameter. The first record to show for this page; the first record is numbered 1.
- `order` (String) Order query parameter. Sort order - asc or dsc.
- `parentId` (String) ParentId query parameter. Fetch tasks that have this parent Id.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `progress` (String) Progress query parameter. Fetch tasks that contains this progress.
- `serviceType` (String) ServiceType query parameter. Fetch tasks with this service type.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sortBy` (String) SortBy query parameter. Sort results by this field.
- `startTime` (String) StartTime query parameter. This is the epoch start time from which tasks need to be fetched.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `taskId` (String) TaskId path parameter. UUID of the Task.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) Username query parameter. Fetch tasks with this username.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
